blocker: converged 42-task run exceeds ~15min compute cap; live re-run hit transient 409 (shared trainable head held by another concurrent worker) and placeholder slug opensre-qwen3-8b needs `hud models fork` first — config+task-file+launcher+single-step live smoke (mean_reward 0.659) all proven
one_line: Assembled the 42-incident RFT task set (tasks_42.json: 34 canonical incl. 19 real postmortems + 8 hard variants) with a deterministic assembler, plus a runnable config-driven GRPO launcher (train_rft_42.yaml/.py) that builds the Taskset from explicit scenario_ids — expanding the trainable surface from 10 to 42 and proven end-to-end via a live HUD smoke
